# GitHub Repository Metadata
<!-- Copy-paste these when creating your GitHub repo -->

## Repository Name (suggested)
```
adlc-agent-kit
```

## Short Description (≤ 350 chars — paste into GitHub "About" box)
```
AI-Driven Development Lifecycle (ADLC) automation kit for Team Panchayat. Orchestrates parallel Claude AI agents (Arjun, Vikram, Kiran, Rasool, Kavya, Rohan, Keerthi) across Terraform, FastAPI, React, and PostgreSQL with a live sprint dashboard.
```

## Topics / Tags (paste into GitHub Topics)
```
claude-ai  ai-agents  devops  cloud-architecture  terraform  aws  fastapi
react  sprint-automation  iac  multi-agent  llm  adlc  team-panchayat
cost-anomaly-detection  orchestration
```

## Repository Settings (recommended)
- Visibility: Private (contains agent prompts and project structure)
- Default branch: main
- Enable Issues: ✅
- Enable Projects: ✅ (link to Azure DevOps or GitHub Projects)
- Require PR reviews before merging: ✅ (1 reviewer minimum)
- Require status checks: ✅ (terraform validate, pytest)
